# Axon Studio

> Axon Studio is a premier custom software development and digital product design agency based in Siliguri, India. We engineer high-performance internal tools, customized ERPs, POS systems, web applications, and high-converting marketing sites that power business growth.

## Core Capabilities
- **Revenue Infrastructure Systems**: Custom POS systems, multi-location franchise platforms, online ordering, reservation systems, and sales CRM development.
- **Operational ERP & Internal Platforms**: Custom-built administrative interfaces, role-based access control dashboards, logistics management, inventory tracking, and procurement portals.
- **Automation & Integrations**: API design, payment reconciliation systems, automated scheduling (e.g. WhatsApp/SMS notifications), and cloud workflow automation.
- **Web Development & SEO**: High-converting websites optimized for performance, clean semantic structure, accessibility (WCAG compliance), and search engine optimization (SEO).

## Featured Projects & Portfolio
- **Multi-Outlet Restaurant POS & Franchise Control System**: Integrated billing, self-ordering kiosks, centralized reporting, and kitchen coordination (KDS).
- **Salon Chain Appointment & Workforce Platform**: Workforce scheduler, booking engine, and branch performance tracking.
- **Manufacturing CRM & Supply Chain Suite**: Automated vendor procurement, supply chain tracking, logistics, and real-time operations reporting.
- **Diagnostic Centre Booking & Sample Collection App**: Home healthcare technician scheduling, online booking engine, patient portal, and report delivery systems.

## Contact & Links

- About Us: https://axonstudio.in/about
- Portfolio: https://axonstudio.in/portfolio
